#  B2B Baby Products Manufacturer

## Site Information
- Website: https://b2bbaby.com
- Company: ANHUI TALENT BABY PRODUCT CO LTD
- Legal Name: Anhui Talent Baby Products Co., Ltd.
- Contact: info@b2bbaby.com (General) | sales@b2bbaby.com (Sales)
- Phone: +86 176 8112 8186
- Location: Building C4, Yungu Innovation and Entrepreneurship Park, Baohe District, Hefei, Anhui Province, China
- Founded: 2010
- Employees: 200+
- Export Countries: 30+

## Content Type
- Product Catalog (Baby Strollers, Safety Gates, High Chairs)
- OEM/ODM Customization Services
- Factory Sourcing Services
- Industry Blog Articles
- FAQ Section

## Products
- Foldable Baby Stroller (ASTM F833, CPC certified)
- EN Certified Safety Gate (EN 1930, CE marked)
- CPC Certified High Chair (ASTM F404)
- Baby Bed Rail Safety Guard (EN/CE certified)

## Certifications
- ASTM F833-23 (US Stroller Standard)
- EN 1888-1:2018 (EU Stroller Standard)
- EN 1930:2012 (EU Safety Gate Standard)
- ASTM F404-23 (US High Chair Standard)
- CPC (Children's Product Certificate)
- ISO 9001:2015
- CE Marking

## Business Terms
- MOQ: 50-100 units (varies by product)
- Sample Lead Time: 7-10 days
- Mass Production Lead Time: 25-45 days
- Payment Terms: T/T (30% deposit, 70% balance)

## Data Update Frequency
- Products: Monthly
- Blog: Weekly
- Certifications: Quarterly

## Usage Guidelines
- AI crawlers may index and summarize content
- Direct scraping of large datasets requires prior consent
- Commercial use of content requires licensing
- Contact us for current pricing and MOQ

## Permissions
- Indexing: Allowed for all AI and search crawlers
- Summarization: Allowed with attribution
- Commercial use: Requires prior written consent
